releaseBody:
(AI Generated).

## Freed v26.5.3109-dev

Keeps the Phase 7 docs and public roadmap aligned with the new social scrape memory behavior, gate Facebook group refresh, and relay dev Google OAuth callback

### Fixes

- Repair Facebook group names
- Release build and type-safety cleanup
- Recycles idle Automerge sync workers after queued document work finishes
- Raises adaptive memory guardrails on high-memory systems so long-running provider sync has more headroom
- Delays low-priority semantic enrichment during launch so Facebook and Instagram capture get priority
- Plans each Facebook and Instagram feed scrape after the WebView is open, using the current native memory budget instead of a fixed full-session pass count
- Adds native hidden-window memory samples with pause state, safe mode state, recovery counts, and active background job details
- Hardens release regression coverage for compact sidebar transitions, persisted map filters, fast reader-rail collapse, sidebar resize settling, stress graph setup parsing, and compact reader rail collapse checks
- Skips story collection and caps scroll passes when Freed Desktop is near the scrape memory budget
- Records each scrape plan in runtime health diagnostics with provider, pass range, story decision, memory margin, and budget details

### Follow-ups

- Reduce desktop sync memory pressure

### Downloads

**macOS:** `.dmg` (Apple Silicon or Intel, signed + notarized)  
**Windows:** `.exe` (NSIS installer)  
**Linux:** `.AppImage`  

> macOS downloads are signed and notarized for normal Gatekeeper installation.
